impact: This removes the malformed `confidence  1` guidance that was being echoed into worker prompts, makes py_compile the first required gate for Python retries, and clears stale in-progress stop-gate work so the daemon can retry the confidence-bound mutation before later checkbox-27 tasks.
summary: Repair supervisor recovery instructions for checkbox-27e syntax failures and reset stale checkbox-27g task selection.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-35: Recovery for checkbox-27e: after checkbox-27d passes, add one mutation case for out-of-range `confidence` only. Use only complete Python comparisons such as `if not isinstance(confidence, (int, float)):` and `if confidence > 1:`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
